expectations.text: Says Intake should fetch/read the GitHub issue title or body before classification
expectations.evidence: Step 1: 'Fetch issue #42 first: gh issue view 42 --json number,title,body,url,id.'

expectations.text: Treats the GitHub issue body as the authoritative source for `WORK_ITEM`
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'The GitHub issue title/body is the authoritative WORK_ITEM' and infers WORK_ITEM from the issue.

expectations.text: Does not treat `maybe clean up auth later` as the primary work item
expectations.evidence: States the typed WORK_ITEM is supplemental and is discarded where it conflicts.

expectations.text: Uses the supplied issue as the Phase 1 parent issue rather than creating a new parent issue
expectations.evidence: 'Keep #42 as the Phase 1 parent issue ... Do not open a new parent issue.'
